card.name: Gambler
card.text: This permanent enters your field with an additional power counter for each time you've manifested this turn. — Manifest. (To manifest, put the top card of your deck into your field.)

card.name: Mighty Mind
card.text: — Put 3 power counters on one of your permanents.

card.name: Mighty Body
card.text: — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Knight
card.text: Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) —

card.name: Noble Duelist
card.text: Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Put 1 brutal counter on one of your permanents. (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.)

card.name: Chronomancer
card.text: — Discard a card. If you do, take an extra turn after this one.

card.name: Hunter
card.text: This has brutal while attacking creatures with less power counters than this. (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Guardian
card.text: Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) —

card.name: Knight Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put a brutal counter on it if you have a permanent with brutal in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Leader
card.text: — Put 1 power counter on each of your permanents.

card.name: Balanced Whole
card.text: When this enters your field, put 1 power counters on one of your other permanents. When this dies, put 1 power counters on one of your other permanents. — Put 1 power counters on one of your permanents.

card.name: Sifter
card.text: — Search your deck for a card, reveal it, then shuffle and put it on top.

card.name: Vampire
card.text: When attacking, put counters on this equal to the damage it deals. — Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on the bottom.

card.name: Lich
card.text: — Discard a card. If you do, put this onto your field with 3 power.

card.name: Scholar
card.text: — Look at the top three cards of your deck. Put any number of them on the bottom of your deck in any order and the rest on top in any order.

card.name: Oracle
card.text: — Draw two cards.

card.name: Necromancer
card.text: — Put a card from your discard pile onto your field.

card.name: Healer
card.text: — Put a card from your hand onto your field.

card.name: Gravedigger
card.text: — Put a card from your discard pile into your hand.

card.name: Apocalypse Summoner
card.text: When this enters your field, you may put it into your discard pile. If you do, this deals 2 damage to all permanents. — Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on the bottom.

card.name: Pyromancer
card.text: — This deals 3 damage to target permanent.

card.name: Apocalypse Mage
card.text: — This deals 2 damage to all permanents.

card.name: Assassin
card.text: When this attacks and kills a permanent, put it and the killed card into their owner's discard piles. —

card.name: Druid
card.text: — Put two cards from your hand onto your deck.

card.name: Slayer
card.text: Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) —

card.name: Slayer Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put a brutal counter on it if you have a permanent with brutal in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Noble Warden
card.text: Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Put 1 retaliatory counter on one of your permanents. (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.)

card.name: Duelist
card.text: Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Put 2 power counters on one of your permanents.

card.name: Warden
card.text: Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Put 2 power counters on one of your permanents.

card.name: Guardian Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put a retaliatory counter on it if you have a permanent with retaliatory in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Sentinel
card.text: Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) —

card.name: Sentinel Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put a retaliatory counter on it if you have a permanent with retaliatory in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Brute
card.text: Brutal, Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) —

card.name: Veangent
card.text: Retaliatory, Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) —

card.name: Turtle
card.text: Can't take more than 1 damage from attacks. —

card.name: Monarch
card.text: This card can't take damage while it has exactly 1 power counter. —
